commands.review_summary:
This draft PR currently reserves a branch for suppressing CLI startup progress during `--json` output but has no file changes yet.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence current-main repro was run in this read-only review. The linked report plus current source make the failure mode source-reproducible, especially for CLI paths that fall through to startup progress before JSON command parsing.

target.title: fix(cli): keep JSON stdout free of startup progress
target.body:
Draft for #88602.

Plan:
- Suppress startup progress for machine-readable --json invocations.
- Ensure Clack progress cannot write spinner glyphs to stdout when stdout must stay byte-clean.
- Add focused regression coverage and real behavior proof before marking ready.

Opening draft first to reserve the lane, then I will implement and update this PR with verification.

Fixes #88602
